message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant App
    participant Game
    participant Player
    participant View
    participant TableView
    participant PlayersListView

    App -> Game : startRound()
    Game -> Player : startTurn()
    Game -> View : render(playersList, table)
    View -> TableView : render(table)
    View -> PlayersListView : render(playersList)
    Game -> PlayersListView : cleanupPlayersList()
    Game -> Player : [playersList.inPlayを回す]
    Game -> View : render(playersList)
    View -> TableView : render(table)
    View -> PlayersListView : render(playersList)
    Game -> App : isEnd()
    App -> Game : boolean
    Game -> App : startRound()
    alt [true]
        Game -> App : endGame()
    else [false]
        Game -> App : startRound()
    end

    Note over Game, View: ターン進行
    Note over Game, View: ターン終了

    Note over Game, View: 七並ベシーケンス図（一周）ver.3
@enduml
